situation: I recently found out my partner had been unfaithful to me and I don't think the relationship will survive.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: hi! how's your day going?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Hi there, I really need someone to talk to. My partner has been cheating on me and I feel totally worthless.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: oh my goodness. I'm so sorry to hear that. when did you find out?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Only very recently. I answered his phone and it was her! When I confronted him he admitted it.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: that's a hard way to find out. are you still in the same house?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Yes because for financial reasons we have to be. Our relationship is really strained though and we are sleeping in separate bedrooms.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: i can't imagine what you are going through, but separate spaces sounds like a very good idea to me.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: It is made worse by the fact that we are in lockdown and so can't really see other people at the moment. Do you think I should try and break away for good?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: before you take any action, i'd ask myself what are your options? you know that his actions have very little to do with you and more to do with him, right?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Well, I could move out but I can't afford to rent a flat on my own. I'd have to move in with my parents, realistically.  I keep telling myself that but I feel really betrayed. I keep wondering what she is like and whether she is prettier and more successful than me.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: are your parents supportive of that idea?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I have not really talked to them about it. I feel a bit ashamed having to admit to them that my relationship has not worked out.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: it's not about her or you. it's about him.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: But I can't help thinking that perhaps I did something wrong that made him stray?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: they will understand. opening up to them will be the hardest part. it's a shame cocktail, but it's not one you made

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Do you think that there is any point at all in trying to mend things at this stage? He has promised he will not see her again but I don't think I could ever trust him.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: it's in our nature as women to ask "what did I do?" but it is never about us or anything we did.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thank you, I am really glad that you understand. I don't feel that I will ever be able to trust any man again!

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: trust and vunerability is huge in a relationship. i'd look for professional help if you wan tot try and work on it

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I can't really afford professional help. And I don't want to be a burden on my friends. I worry that I am already annoying them.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content:
do you have a friend who has been through a similar situation? sometime that helps.

also, sharing your burden with someone does NOT add to their burden

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I do have a friend who has been through the same though ironically it is a male friend whose wife cheated on him!

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: my guess is he felt the same way you are feeling right now

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Yes. It is just such a deep betrayal. I think I could have forgiven him if it had just been a one time mistake but he had been seeing her for ages.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: watch the brene brown video on youtube with the cartoon animal about empathy - it should help when looking for friends to rely upon grrrr. that would make me angry too

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: It is nice to have things to distract myself from the things that are making me feel terrible. Do you have any other suggestions for distractions?  I just keep thinking that every evening when he was returning home with me and with every nice thing he said he was being false.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: i'm totally into the podcasts "a slob comes clean" basically it's about getting your poop in a group

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Hmm that sounds .. interesting :D. Is that a metaphor?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: that's so hard. imagine how much energy he had to use to keep his lives from colliding. he couldn't find a better use for that energy?!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I know, right!! Do you think it would be helpful for me to try and talk to this woman and see how she feels? I dunno if she even realises that he was in a committed relationship

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: yes! LOL but it's been helping me focus my anxiety into being a bit more productive

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Anything that will help me with my anxiety is worth trying at the moment.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: what do you want to hear from her? is there anything she could say that woudl make you feel better? NO!! she's not going to be able to help you unless you need a witness for divorce court

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: It would be less of a betrayal, I think, if she did not know about me. I would never do that to another woman!

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: she likely knew, othewise how would he explain all the time he spent with you to her?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I suppose that's a good point too. I think maybe I do just need to make a total break and not look back.  I do appreciate you talking, you have helped me to see things a great deal more clearly than I previously did.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: glad i could help. please stay safe and no matter what you decide to do, you will be fine.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thank you and the same to you! Have a nice rest of day.

situation: I am feeling very depressed due to work load

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Hello

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Hi, how are you doing?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I am not doing well. I am feeling very depressed due to work load and current household situation

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I'm sorry to hear that. Would you like to talk about it?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Yes, due to COVID life is messed up. Work load has increase and more responsibility of household.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: COVID has really changed a lot of stuff. I understand your frustration. Has your work increased because of COVID conditions. Meaning you have to take extra work, or doing tasks that you dislike to do?  If you don't feel comfortable elaborating, we can always talk about how you feel and how you can maybe feel a bit better.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Due to the furlough Company has increased my my work load three times. I am not able to take rest. Getting depressed everday.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: That sounds really bad. I once worked in a company that placed unnecessary pressure on me, with a low pay. I can relate to how you feel. Do you have to depend on this company for work?   Sometimes it's really not worth working somewhere if it's really affecting your mental health.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: They are paying me well but It is hard to take the load beside I have family and kids responsibility. I don't have time for them.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I understand. But I want you to think about this. Your mental health is more important right now because it is affecting you. And how you feel really affects those around you, especially the ones who love you. If you take some time to think about what is more important to you in life right now can help you make a decision.  Working so hard can be a barrier right now. But you may have a bright future plan ahead. If so, that is something you want to look forward to.  I know what you are doing is really helping your family. And I know they really appreciate it, even if they don't say it.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I can understand that. But my job is really important right now as my partner lost his in COVID. and he is not doing anything right now not even helping at home. It makes me more low and it is hard to take care of 3  younger kids who are staying at home full time.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Ok, I understand better now. Thank you for explaining. What you are telling should to be something you need to discuss with your partner. Do both of you communicate well with each other? Maybe he is not aware of your situation or how you feel.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Nowadays he is so frustrated doesn't like to talk even. Whenever I bring household responsibilities or kids topic, he gets frustrated.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Oh no. I can see from his part he feels upset and frustrated because he may feel useless at the moment. But that's not an excuse to neglect responsibilities. You can maybe make him feel more useful around the house by starting to assign him small tasks. Encouraging him to do stuff and rewarding him with words of encouragement. I know it sounds kind of frustrating to do that, but maybe this small step on your half could also help him.   Do you have any family member that are close to you? If your partner isn't helpful, maybe seeking help from family can reduce your housework load.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Nobody lives near by. Kids are to young to understand. I felt bit good after talking to you. Thanks

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I'm sorry if this did not help the situation. But I'm always glad to listen if you want to talk more.  It's a really tough situation, but you're a really strong individual. You've made it this far : )

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Talking to you made me feel good. Thanks for listening to me. I am feeling light now. You are agreat help. Thank you so much Hope all will come back on place soon

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: No problem. I really wish you the best and I hope everything works out! Crossing my fingers COVID ends soon.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Hope so. Byee take care

situation: One of my classes is extremely difficult and my professor is not responsive.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Hi there, how is this season treating you?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: It's alright. Definitely not as cold as last year which is something to be slightly thankful for.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Well let's be grateful for small mercies :). How are you feeling in yourself though? Is there anything you'd like to talk about?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I'm worried about grad school

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Ah I am sorry to hear that. Please try not to worry too much as it's a common worry to have. Do you want to tell me the details?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Sure. One of my classes is extremely difficult and the professor has not been responsive at all. The TA is kind enough to make time to help me with homework, but my grades are still not great. It makes me feel really dumb and undeserving to be in that class

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: So you are feeling as though you are in the wrong place? Do you feel as though you might fail your class completely?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I want to be in the program, it's just that I feel like everyone is so much smarter than me and my performance in that class makes me question my admission into the programs sometimes. When I feel like this after submitting homework, I end up crying because I just want to do well. I enjoy this field, just not this  class in particular.  I'm afraid of failing, but I'm not sure if that should be a concern either. Over the past 3 years, no one has gotten a grade lower than a B.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: But do you really think that you would have been admitted to the class if you were not up to the standard? Do you think that maybe most of your classmates are secretly feeling the same?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Sometimes I think about that. At the same time, I feel like it's unfair to compare myself to others.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: This sounds like it might be a self esteem issue and not about your grades. I have felt this sort of thing myself and I do know how awful it is to be so hard on yourself.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: So what do I do about it? I don't want to keep feeling like this

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Have you thought about seeing a therapist? Does your school have any free therapy programmes you could use?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I don't think my school has free therapy programs. I have thought about seeing a therapist but I've heard therapy is very expensive.With student loans, I didn't really put much more research into therapy past hearing about the costs.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: A far as I am aware there are charitable organisations which can arrange a few free therapy session for you. Perhaps you could talk to your doctor about it?  I have had free therapy sessions before and I found them very helpful

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I think free therapy sessions would be a good place to start

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: It would help you work on your self confidence and you might find that you are not doing as badly in school as you think you are.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Yeah, there are definitely a lot of other things i'm insecure about

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Then I think it is probably just a general self esteem issue and nothing academic!  Anyway it's been really nice to talk to you and I hope that everything goes your way

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I think talking about this has helped. I'll do a little more digging. Thank you!

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: You're most welcome, have a lovely Holiday season.

situation: Covid 19 stress with the added stress of the holduas

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: hello?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: hello, how can I help you?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I'm seeking some support. Specifically looking for advice concerning my depression

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: How long have you known you have depression?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I've struggled with depression my entire life. It's been especially difficult this year

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Because of Covid? So you know at least the cause of your depression?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Yes, because of Covid. I have two small children both born with genetic disorders. If they catch it they could die. They're both now displaying signs of anxiety and that's worsening my depression because there is very little I can do about it.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: That must have been tough for you. I know Covid is scary, however, I think you're a very careful parent so as long as you keep the routine safe, you can at least not worry too much about it

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I'm doing my best, as is my husband, but with the holdays here we're struggling to explain our decision not to visit family because we want the children to be safe. Our family is a combination of Covid Hoaxers and antimaskers sadly.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Now is not the time to please your family or anyone else. You did the right and responsible thing for refusing to visit them.  May I ask how old your children are?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thank you for agreeing with me. They are nine and four.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: they might have been scared because of external forces, as in they might see you being stressed out. I think it's good to talk to them about the seriousness of Covid, but also explain them it's not unpreventable. By discussing, you can reassure yourself too

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Maybe. I'll have to give them a few days as my mother is very self centered and we just got into it last night, but I might give that a try

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I think you can also cut down on watching news, when it first began, I followed the news closely, however, I realized I felt depressed hearing new number everyday so I only update myself once a week now and I feel bette

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: That's good to hear, maybe I should do that.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Having a family meeting with your husband and children as much as possible to share your feelings might also help quite a bit

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I'm not so sure. My husband's anxiety is worse than mine and I carry the mental load for the entire family. He's usually happier staying in the dark, otherwise it's too difficult to lift him up when he's depressed if I'm also depressed.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Then do as you think is best for your husband. I'd say focus the work on yourself first, you need to feel good in other to take care of your family

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: That is true. Thank you for the advice

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: you're welcome, I hope you feel a bit better

situation: Everything was going crazy in the world with COVID. I was worried about my daughter and her education. Then suddenly, I lose a lot of my hours at work and have to quit one of my jobs due to the virus and becoming her main caretaker again. This really makes me nervous because the price of everything is continually going up and I have little excess money to spend.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Hi, not a good time right now. Really concerned

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I'm sorry to hear that . How can I help?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
I just need someone to listen. I want to know everything will be ok
 I really hope things get better sooner than later

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I understand. Tell me what's going on.  I'm here to listen.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Since CORONA I have had to quit working my second job and become a full time stay at home parent. This is causing our family a loss of considerable income and with everything going on right now in the world it makes it even more worse.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I understand. It is a scary time right now. Things will not always be this way though. We will get through it.  The important part right now is to stay safe and healthy for yourself and for your family.  What kind of work did you do before the pandemic?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
I'd like to think this will be over sooner than later, but it's hard to really think about it. I was a merchandiser for retail stores.
 I had been a stay at home parent before so our family was used to one income for a long time. It was nice to not always have to stress about money since I was working again. It seems the stress is a lot more now though because of everything going on in the country.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Yes our country is in a lot of uncertainty right now. And having a second income always helps. Have you considered possibly finding a work from home job? Perhaps look at what skills you've developed, and update your resume to reflect the skills you have that will transfer over to a work from home job.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I'm always concerned about scams. There are so many untrustworthy places that I hate putting myself and my information out for others to get who aren't honest.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I understand. There are always companies or jobs out there that are scams. What I found worked best was looking at reputable sites like LinkedIn, GlassDoor, etc. Right now is a good time to find a work from home job from reputable companies. I've found that a lot of companies have transitioned over and developed jobs that can be done from home. I actually work from home myself.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Oh thats really encouraging. I will definitely look into that.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Another suggestion I can make is contacting your local workforce department  (department of unemployment) as they can make suggestions too.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
I never thought about the unemployment office. I know so many people are worse off than me that I almost feel guilty to reach out. I really appreciateyour trips
 tips

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: You already have a lot of skills you didn't think about. As a stay at home parent, you are like the CEO of your own company. You manage day to day operations. You also do scheduling, finance management, etc.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: That's very true!

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I understand feeling guilty for asking for help.  But don't worry that is what they are there for!

situation: i am currently suffering from my recent miscarriage of my baby . In this winter i lost my baby in car itself while going to medical shop.Without doctor or any medical help i lost my baby in lot of bleeding.It leads to lot of depression

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: hello, what is on your mind today?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
my baby who died in my womb at 5th month i crying everyday and went to depression 
 how to overcome this pain

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: miscarriages are really hard I lost a set of twins about 15 years ago.  It still makes me sad to wonder what they would be today.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yes , mine is very worst case .In winter time at midnight heavy bleeding done and lost baby oh god , you are a such brave person

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I have had other children since then, and they make me happy but there will always be a sense of loss. i am sure that is not what you wnat to hear right now but i dont like to lie

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: this is my first pregnancy

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: i actually got a tattoo of a little heart with two halos on my right shoulder to honor thier memory my miscarriage was my first prgnancy as well. i wonder sometimes if it is just our body saying it wasnt ready yet.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yes that is heard and not able to mingle

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: are you in a relationship?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yes , our body knows what to keep or not.still our mind not agree to loose yes ,married my childhood best friend

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: that is great, i hope he is supportive.  you know, it may be a blessing in disguise. with COVID and all the hospitals full, maybe whatever higher power you believe in was saying you are meant to have a healthy baby in a healthy society

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yea. he is so caring. when we brought new house , next month i got preganent and got full time jobs for both , we were so happy but god turned our fate

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: wow, that is a lot going on at once!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yes when i think in deep felt yea it is good  to loose baby in covid but still i bared lot pain as single in bath room

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: you two have time now for you to get healthy and recover and get the house exactly how you want it for a family

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: except my hubby , nobody in home lot of bed in car and bathroom entire night lot of blood *

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: i had to move into a house a week after having a baby because i went into preterm labor and ended up tearing my stitches. it was a nightmare. i would have loved for my timelime to be differnt, but sometime we have to deal with the hand we are given

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yes , we need to do and arrange the house

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I remember that. So much blood, it was scary thinking it was all coming out of me

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yes dear , we will do like that ..you a such a brave and caring person

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: well, you have time to get the house ready and when covid restrictions lift get yourself in a moms group so you have support and people to answer questions when they come up!  i found a moms group on facebook. They were great to answer pregnancy questions and offer support and suggestions.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: wow is it ..please share the name

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: the depression is normal too. you suffered a loss. Your hormones are still out of whack, those take some time to get back to normal i just searched for the county i live in and moms group. i bet there is one in your area too!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yea dear ..sure will check and will add in that groups ..it will help for me

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: it will :)  just hang in there and remember everything happens for a reason, even though we may not know the reason and we don't like that it happened!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: thank you dear for ur kind words sure dear , will do and time will solve many issues

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: i wish you luck and health!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: thank you and wish you the same

situation: I just feel very alone at work lately. I don’t feel like anyone at work really likes me and no one ever really talks to me or invites me to hang out with them anymore.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Hi. I’m feeling really depressed lately

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I'm sorry to hear this. Is there something specifically bothering you?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I just feel like no one I work with really likes me or cares about me

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: You don't think people like you or care about you at work? What specifically have they done to make you think this?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I just feel like no one talks to me and if I try and talk to them they are very dismissive

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I can understand that might make you feel uncomfortable.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I feel like I go out of my way to help people and I remember their birthdays and I try and be nice to them but no one ever does the same for me

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I have been in many work situations and even social situations where I did not feel as if I fit in, I'm rather an unusual person. I had to learn to not focus so much on BEING accepted. I had to learn what God think of me (he loves me) and try to be kind to all I meet, other centered. That is, I also had to make sure I wasn't being rude or mean.  I can understand how hurtful that is. Our society isn't as kind as it once was. I find very few people appreciate kindness. However, I can't get caught up in that, it's the way people are. It isn't a reflection of myself. I think it is the hardest thing to be more concerned with others than we are with ourselves, it can be lonely.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I think from now on I’m just going to focus on myself and my family, I’m not gonna out of my way to be nice to my coworkers, I’m just going to treat them as coworkers not as friends and just keep to myself

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I think you can be kind to them, but I think perhaps your expectations are that they reciprocate, and they aren't which hurts. Perhaps be kind without expecting anything in return, and know that God sees your kindness.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I always feel like you have to be a friend to have friends, but I’m tired of being the only one putting effort in and getting taken advantage of

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I also had this happen, I had no friends and at first I thought it was me, then I realized it was an opportunity for personal growth. Which wasn't easy.  How do you feel they take advantage? Being ignored is one thing, having someone take advantage of you is a different story.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I just feel like they just expect me to do things for them now and when I do it, it’s no appreciated because they just know I will do it.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I understand. Yes, then they definitely are taking advantage. Have you read anything on setting boundaries and learning how to say no?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Yeah, I’m working on taking care of myself more than worrying about everyone else. I think the holidays make it even harder to set the boundaries

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I had learned once that it is so important to be able to easily say no because then we are free to say yes.  Because if we say yes because we CAN'T say no, then we feel resentful. So If I can freely say no to you, then i am free to say yes, if that makes sense.  Although for me, it was hard to say no, but it gets easier, now it is easy. It wasn't at first.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thank you! You have been very helpful. I think that will be my goal! Start learning to say no and don’t feel guilty about it. I think I am going to lower my expectations from other people and just start treating people as they treat me!

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: If I always say yes, because I can't say no, I feel obligated and resentful, when really, it's me with the problem, I had a hard time saying no because I didn't want to hurt people. Now, I  do the right thing in my heart, if I want to help, I help, if I want to say no, I say no even if it is hard, I don't care if they get upset. I can say no, that's true freedom. I don't advise treating people the way they treat you though. I would remain a kind person. Be the person you are no matter what type of person they are. You have to stand before God one day. If they are ugly, that's on them. But you want to be a kind person. That's the right thing, and you CAN be kind and say no. Those two are fine together! :D I suggest a book called "Bounderies" one of the authors is Townsend -- great book.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I think I just need to learn a new approach to how I handle my dealings with other people.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Might be on youtube too. Good stuff on how to say no and set boundaries! :D  I think you have identified your problem and looked at it and you seem intelligent and caring! I'm sure you will be able to figure this out. You seem like a  nice person to me, and I just met you. You seem emotionally mature, able to discuss your problems and think about it in a mature way.  A lot of people will just blame others and not change. We can't change others, we can only change ourselves. That's the hard part but recognizing we can change and must is so important!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thanks for your help

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: You are welcome! Have a nice evening!

situation: my family is very superficial and they can't connect authentically with me

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Hi there, how are you feeling today?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: hello. meh. pretty sad

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I am sorry to hear that. I will help if I can - what is the matter?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
my family is very superficial
 i'm sad they aren't able to connect with me in a meaningfulway

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: (Sorry I was afk) I am really sorry to hear that. Can you elaborate a bit? Is it one specific family member or all of them?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: lol its all of them...parents and sister idk it's a bit personal and very sad. i wouldn't want to make you sad too

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Is the problem bad enough that you feel you would like to cut them off entirely?  I am sorry, I was not trying to intrude :)

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yeah, actually my husband and i were talking about cutting them off  i've cut them off before but this time i have more stability and am happy with my life (unlike they come and ruin all the nice things in my life with their bad attitudes)

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: It is a very big decision to make, but in some cases it is the best one.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: #toxicfamily - it's just all very sad

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Is there any possibility of getting professional counselling or something before making the final decision?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yeah we just talked to my therapist

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I am glad you have someone to talk to!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: she said its best to not even write them. ive been trying for over 25 years yea my husband and therapist are the best

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: If a professional thinks that then maybe it really is the best thing to do. It seems unlikely they will change

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yeah they aren't changing. they actually are getting worse! my mom accused my aunt of stealing from her. and turns out the money was under her mattress the whole time...

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: That sounds really bad. Making false accusations about people is evil.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yeah, and then she forced my aunt to drive her to the bank and tried to jump out of the car!

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Okay that sounds really bizarre. I think you truly are better off without them

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yeah, she's a pretty terrible person :/

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: The saying that we can choose our friends but not our family is very true.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yup well thanks for listening

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: You're most welcome :) We need to keep talking till fifteen mins is up though. Is there anything else you'd like to talk about?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Yea i thought it was 15 minutes but there in the side panel it says 10-15 but we can do a couple more minutes too

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: No worries :). Please try not to fret too much about your problem - to be honest I have some weird family members too

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: for real... it was his adoptive dad's 92 nd birthday and they refused to pay for his dinner. they said they would pay for their own dinner only. and my dad is rich and my family is in south america and they aren't poor but c'mon!

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Wow... that is seriously toxic. Definitely you should be away from them, it will improve your life a lot

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: an entire 6-course dinner for 6 people is like $50 smh.... they are just awful people

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Anyway I hope I have been able to be of help and I wish you all the best for the future! I think things will be better when you are free of them.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: i hope so! its hard to cut them off but its worse if I stay thanks dear. apprecaite the chat

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: you too :) Can you press quit and take the survey as for some reason I can't do it first my end

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: thanks bye

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: bye :)

situation: My friends will not hangout with me because I will not get the Covid 19 vaccine

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Hello

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: whats on your mind?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I have been having problems with my friends.

dialog.speaker: supporter

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
They will not hangout with me because I will not get the vaccine. I do wear my mask and social distance
 but they still will not hangout.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: then they are not your friends  it should be your choice and a true friend would support you rdecision

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: We use to hangout all the time go to movies eat at each others houses. But snice I didn't get the vaccine yet they don't invite me anymore. I see on Facebook where they are meeting and having dinner.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: cdc reports 2,509 people died after getting the vaccine. that is 0.0017% but still too high for me

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
Yes I'm
 just afraid of the long term effects from it. We have nothing to go on and what if it causes cancer or something else. My friends think that is none sense and I just need to man up.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: wonder.cdc.gov you can serahc for side effects. maybe if you show them data they will lay off y ou and let you come around  according to the search page, its caused 64 abortions

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
That's not a bad idea. I need to show them that because
 they all are prolife

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: i think you are being smart. i am doing the same. wait to see what the long term effect are

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thank you. I was starting to worry I was the only one thinking like this.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: 22% of people get headaches most common is chills fatigue pain nausea  why get a vaccine that gives you the same symptoms you are trying to avoid? lol

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
O wow that's
 crazy. I will need to show them that for sure. I need to ask them if they had any problems from it.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: my coworker got hers this week. she had a headche, stomach ache and felt weak. maybe do a group chat so they call as see what sympotoms they all had maybe if they see it all out there, they will undersstand your position

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: That is a really good idea. I think that may work.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: it can't hurt to try!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
I am going to try that today forsure.
 I hope it helps them see where I am coming from.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: it cant hurt, that is for sure what does your familythink?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
Yes hopefully that will help them see where I come from. Then maybe they will let me hangout with masks
 They are ok with my choice.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: well that is good!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Yes they are really supportive and we have zoom calls each Friday night.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: thats awesome! we did a masssive family zoom for my grandma's 93rd birthday

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
That is great it really does help bring people together
.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: it does. it was nice talking to someone wit hte same perspective for once!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
I feel the same way. Thank you so much,
 Have a great day.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: have a great day!

situation: i am very stressed at work so i have started to look for a new job but can't find anything

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: hello is anyone here?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Sorry, How are you doing today?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: i am okay i guess

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Do you want to talk about whats going on?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yeah well basically i'm stressed up at work and i can't any any new job

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Oh, whats going on at work?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: we usually help 10 to 15 customers a day and the amount of work has increased so i'm very stressed

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Oh im sorry to hear that. Holiday times can make many jobs really hard. Maybe you should look into treating yourself to something as a reward?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: no that would be bad since i need the money

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: OH i meant i think we have had enough, But ill keep going cause im in the same boat as you on that front.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: we need at least 10 turns (two messages per turn), so what advice do you have for me?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Well id get your favorite food, pop on your favorite show, and just try to forget about work for now.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: that's not really helpful since it won't really solve the problem

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: It wont help the problem at work. It might help your mindset though. I think the only way your work situation would be helped would be by hiring more staff to ease the burden.

dialog.speaker: seeker

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Yea im sure it will hopefully get back to normal for you

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Oh i didnt know you were able to do that. Definitely take a day for yourself!

dialog.speaker: seeker

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Not a problem at all!

situation: My partner broke up with me but they did not tell me the reason why

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Hello!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Hello

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Is there anything you'd like to talk about today?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Yes,i feel like i am in depsression.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Im sorry to hear that. What do you think may have led up to these feelings of being depressed??

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: My partner broke up with me impromptu

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Oh dear, yes that can be incredibly hard to deal with. Relationships are so full of emotion that when they end it can feel like chaos or despair. Ive been through a few bad breakups myself in the past so i know how you must be feeling right now.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Exactly,that is my current situation.I feel like my entire life has been rearranged How did you deal with them and specifically what was your coping mechanism?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Well to be honest in some ways your life has been rearranged, but thats okay. Its not EASY, but it is okay, or rather will be okay. experiencing life is just a big bunch of rearrangements that we learn to adapt to and grow from and even out of. Its what gives us depth and character as human beings. HA, well at first i cried and was mad and just moped and hated everything, but eventually i got tired of no getting anything out of my days. I slowly realised that i had put myself in slow motion and then slowly started to do things i used to do to maybe come out of it.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: True,what ways would you suggest i use to approach my situation and get out of this state? It is very pathetic really when you think of it,halting all your life activities and plans just because a relationship ended.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Well i had a close friend that i was able to vent to and help me see what was important. Do you have anyone close in your life you could talk to for guidance?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Close friends can really be helpful in such situations.Yes,i do have a close friend even though i am very poor when it comes to opening up.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I see what you mean about pathetic lol. But rather than see yourself as pathetic in a negative, use that defiance to push yourself back out into the world. Start slowly with opening up, maybe even tell your friend you intent and ask them to be patient as you learn to better express your inner feelings

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Yes,i should do that because at the end of it all i still have myself to take care of

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I think youre already on the right track. I just know you can get back to you!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
Opening up is a skill that i could do better at because i have never been the open type.But with a little practice i could get better at it.
 I have to get better no matter what.Are there other tactics you can share with me with regards to my current situation?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: There are resources online that perhaps you could look into to help with expressing yourself.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Is there any particular resource you can refer me to?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Yes just a moment

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Waiting,thank you

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I was going to send you a few links but it wont let me

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
Ooh too bad
 Could you just name a few then i can look them up on my own later?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: instead try googling the phrase " how to open up to others" and there should be a few sites with tips and references

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Ok that's rather helpful

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: healthyplace.com has a good article

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Will definitely check it out

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Im hope that i have been able to help at least a little bit

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
You have been of a very great help to me today
 I feel better and ready to face the world

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Excellent! im so happy to hear that, Maybe next time youll be the one to inspire someone! Have a great rest of your day!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I hope so too and wishing you a great day too

situation: Nothing special just an ongoing thing i've been dealing with since my daughter was born.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Hello, how are you doing today?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I've been dealing with a lot of depression lately.  not sure how to shake it (1)

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Im sorry to hear that, has there been anything going to cause the increase?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: My daughter was born about 3 months ago.  I guess it's post-partum.(2)

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: That is really rough, though it is good you recognize it. A lot of people do not.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Well I figured when I was crying at the Pampers commercial that there might be an issue (3)

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Have you tried to talk to a professional. It is very prevalent that mothers experiencing this do.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I've talked to my doctor that delivered my daughter about it.  He recommended medication but I'm not so sure I want to take something for the rest of my life (4)

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: As long as you recognize that it is a much more common thing that people go through, that is a great start. I experienced it with my second child as well.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Did they put you on medication (5)

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: There is no harm getting a second opinion. I never did take medication, i found a good therapist to talk too.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: A second opinion is probably a good thing.  I just know I can't keep laying in bed 1/2 the day with the baby. (6)

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Yeah that you cant, and i cant stress how good it is that you realize it. I would definitely go for a second opinion. Or even search for therapists that specialize in it in your area. Never have been a fan of using medicine as the first go unless really needed.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Yeah, I'm not big on the medication.  I've talked to several moms that went on it and years later had to stay on it because the withdrawals were so terrible.  I'd like to be able to process through it(7)

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: And whats the worst a little talking can do for you. Has talking to other moms been helpful at all?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Well, some of them LOL!  Others just scare me to pieces so it really depends on who it is!  My husband does not understand at all but he's trying (8)

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: At least he is trying, as i said before, even with it being so common, it is a mystery to most.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I don't think a lot of people talk about it.  You have this new healthy child, you should be excited, and yet there is extreme sadness and no idea why so you stay quiet about it (9)

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Yeah its a rough cycle, you get down on yourself for feeling down.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Exactly, like it's my fault that I feel this way.  My head knows that is  not right, my heart another story. (10)

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Well, i am glad you want to do something about it. I hope you do follow up with a second opinion, or maybe even support groups in your area.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Yes, I am going to look into some support groups in our area and maybe a therapist as well.  Just need to do some research to find some locally

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Great, thats wonderful news. I think you are on the right track to being yourself again.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I certainly hope so.  I'd like to enjoy this little bundle of joy instead of just spending all day at home doing nothing

situation: One of my best friends I lived with moved out and screwed us over with the lease and her rent the DAY BEFORE rent was due and then blocked us on everything so that we couldn't ask her to  pay.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Hi

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: hey friend! I should let you know that if you have typed in a description, i cant see it. how are you doing ?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I am doing alright, and yeah I did type in the description. Do you want me to tell you what I typed?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: If you're willing to share, please.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: So I'm frustrated with an ex-friend right now. I lived with her and 2 other friends and she just moved out the day before rent was due and then blocked us on everything so we couldn't ask her to pay her rent. So I'm pretty frustrated, but also sad that a friend would do that, yanno?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: ouch. that sounds like it really hurts. how are you feeling about that? betrayed? sad? mad?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
All of the above reallu
 really

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Yeah, its a low blow. What are you looking for around this?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
I'm not really sure what you mean by that. I guess I'm looking for closure from her
 Because she left without really any explanation

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Closure seems only reasonable.  Realistically, logically, I can't give that to you here. I can do all sorts of other things though. I can remind you that all that you feeling is totally valid!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Haha yeah that's true. It would be unreasonable to want closure from someone who doesn't even know why themselves! Thank you for validating me :)

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: And know that closure isn't something anyone can give you, you can give it to yourself. You may never forget this act, but you have the option to forgive, to be compassionate to whatever you friend may be going through, and act with love.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
Yeah you are right. It wouldn't be good to hold onto these negative feelings for so long. I need to move on
 Focus on the good

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Heck yeah! Theres no need to give your energy and power away, and if your friend comes back into your life, you can repair and heal. Whats brought you joy today?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Something that brought me joy today was seeing some work friends when I got to work :) I just got a new tattoo and everyone had been complimenting it!

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content:
Thats great! I judge you are worthy of the compliments :) Thanks for connecting with me today
!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
Thank you too! You've been really helpful
 Have a nice day!

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: likewise!

situation: I found out that my boyfriend had been lying to me about his entire life, and so the future that he had said we were building towards was all but impossible. I'm trying to figure out if I should stay with him.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Hello, what is life like for you at the moment?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
Infinitely complicated.
 Too many decisions. I don't know what to do.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I am sorry to hear that but I am happy to listen and help you if I can what sort of things are you trying to decide?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
I don't even know where to start.

 I'm trying to decide if I can build trust with him again.
 He lied about everything.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Well, let's try to take it one problem at a time so's not to get overwhelmed. What is your biggest problem at the moment?  Ah, am I to take it that a relationship has recently ended?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
When we met, before we got involved, he said he was divorced. I ended up finding out that he was still legally married. He assured me that they were just a pen's stroke away from being divorced.


 That was in March.
 I found out three weeks ago that they're actually still living together.
 ANd, no. We haven't broken up yet.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Ah I totally hear you .. the old 'we're getting divorced' line. I've been in that one! You are well out of this.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
I'm debating. I don't know what to do.
 I feel like a schmuck.
 He has such pretty words.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: From personal experience I think that if they say they're going to get divorced and then drag their feet it is never going to happen.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
And he invests so much time and effort into us.
 I agree with you.
 My mind agrees.
 My stupid emotions are clouding things.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Well, if you were to give him an ultimatum what do you think he would say?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
I did.
 LOL

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: And he's still married?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
And he brought his kids to my house so they could meet my kids. He had a conversation with them about why he and their mother had been living the way they had. (in seperate floors of the house)
 That was two weeks ago.
 So, yes, he is.
 Too soon to tell.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I can tell that you feel that you are being cheated here. I can't tell you what to do but don't you think you deserve better?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I guess that's what I'm trying to figure out. Should I give him time to prove himself now that he's backed into a corner.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: It's not for me to say but I wonder if he's really going to change as he has not already.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: That's not an easy question to answer. He treats me very well. Always has. And he is frantically trying to accomodate me, now htat I know. I agree with you. It's one of my fears.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: How do your children feel about this? And his?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
MY children (6 and 9) have been living with him in their lives as a male figure who is growing into a father figure. He and I have been together for fifteen months, and part-time living together for six.
 This isn't a new relationship. That's part of the complication, too.
 His kids actually asked if they could come live with me while he and his (ex?) figured their shit out.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Yes, I can imagine that it is. It is always really difficult when children are involved. I know you would not want your children to be hurt

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: It's a messed up situation that COVID has not improved. He was furloughed in May. Indeed I don't, you're right.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I hear you. Covid has disrupted the whole world so might this year! I can't wait for it to be over.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: But now it seems like it will hurt them if I break up with him.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: But it will hurt them more the longer the situation goes on :(

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
I wish I could say that I were confident that 2021 would be better, but...
 Too right.
 And this is all a part of why this is not a simple situation.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Well it surely could not be worse :)

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
I have no doubt that he loves me very much.
 Hahahaha! Seems that way. 
 He didn't make this lie up for me. That's an interesting thing.
 He was living the "divorced dad" lie to A LOT of people.
 Anybody and everybody who was far enough away to be lied to.
 She lives in her bedroom. Only comes out to work two nights a week. DOesn't want to have anything to do with her kids (5, 9, 11, 13)

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: (sorry was afk let me catch up)

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: And she and my BF have been living that way for three years. Over a year before I even met him.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Is it possible she is suffering from depression?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I would all but guarantee it.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: It just worries me that he might treat you the same way if you were ever in the same position

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
Here's the other kicker, though...
 She knows about me. 
 (I know. You're right. I thought that as well)

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: And how does she feel about you?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
She doesn't care. She just wants to keep the status quo. She likes the money and security.
 (before he was furloughed, he made very good money.)

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I think it would be better if he  were able to come to a sensible financial solution with her. This situation is damaging for everyone.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
Yes!
 I agree!
 EVERYBODY!

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I hope I have been able to have been of some help to you :) A very happy New Year to you!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Happy New Year!

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: You just need to press quit and take the survey - it has to be done at your end :)

t thanks for remembering this card

situation: I miss my friends during this COVID-19 pandemic.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Hey!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Hello. How are you?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I'm doing well. How are you?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I am having a difficult time not being able to go out. I am an introvert and didn't think COVID-19 would be a problem but I find myself being short and impatient.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Yeah i'm in the same boat. It's tough having to be cooped up.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: How have you coped with it?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Are you working from home?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Yes but I go in 1-2 days per week. It is in a building where I am by myself so that is not great.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I've been having a hard time too and I've absolutely noticed that I've become short and impatient with people lately. I have been trying to be mindful but it's hard. I find going for walks and getting slight exercise helps.  I'm also pretty introverted and at first i enjoyed the shutdowns but as time drags on it's gotten difficult  Have you found ways to be physically active?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
I work out all the time and that does help. I would like to just go out and have a drink at a bar but were shut down.
 Yes, I work out everyday. I will run for an hour later followed by 100 push ups and situps.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Does that help at all?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: A little. But I have always done that so I feel like that is just normal. It used to be done at a gym but that is not safe now.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: So it sounds like you are missing a lot of the social aspects of day to day stuff?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Yes. Mostly my friends. Who I didnt see a ton anyways.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I've definitely noticed that for myself, even though I normally prefer my space and solitude  Have you tried calling, texting, or even video chatting with them?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I zoom with them every few weeks. have you tried anything that helps?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content:
I seem to feel better after communicating with friends but I also get a little overwhelmed with video chats. I feel like Im always on my computer now so I'm working at trying to actively seeing my friends even if it means distancing or whatever. 
 Do you have a park or a hiking trail or something that you could meet them at? That way you stay outside and can distance as necessary.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
That makes sense. I feel I am on my computer a lot now too. I am thinking about going to the park shortly with my dog.
 I also think my kid's homework and remote learning has stressed me.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Do you have friends that could go with you to the dog park? Do you think you'd feel comfortable physically being around other people?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I am ok with it. My parks are pretty empty now. I think that sounds like a wonderful idea.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: im sure seeing someone in person will help even if it's for a few minutes. Once you figure out how to hang out with someone that makes you both comfortable, the next times will be that much easier.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: That sounds good. Thanks for your help.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: No problem! I'm glad I could help or at least try to help

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: You were helpful. I appreciate you!

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Awe thanks! I appreciate you too.

situation: I am in a critical situation in need of money, urgently for my business. I was sure my friend will help me. To my surprise, he has refused, in spite of my help to him previously when he was in a similar situation.

dialog.content: Would you like to give me a few more details?

I expected my friend surely will help. But he did not. This has put me some anger on him. This was a situation that happened 1 year before. Now I recall this for chatting.

dialog.content: Well, are you sure that he could have definitely afforded to loan you anything?

dialog.speaker: seeker

Well, the thing is, just because you had lent to him does not mean he is obliged to help you
 Though of course it would have been the courteous thing to do

dialog.speaker: supporter

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: However I continue the friendship not affected by this harassment.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Aren't you worried that it might rankle with you and surface again at some time to affect the friendship?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: My behavior with him will not be affected because of this. But whenever I happen to think or recall of this I get to anger of it unavoidably. And cools off in some time.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: It is understandable. I hope that I have been able to help you a little and thank you for talking it out!

dialog.speaker: seeker

dialog.speaker: supporter

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Generally I am cool, not an emotional person. If I need any special training, it should be only because of this. If there is some simple  way that could help.

dialog.speaker: supporter

dialog.speaker: seeker

dialog.speaker: supporter

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: If you are urgent, I do not want to delay you . Thanks, Bye.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content:
bye! you have to press quit. It does not work from this end.  Please press quit or neither of us gets paid. This has already taken twice as long as it should have. 
 Please press quit.

dialog.content: Hi! 😊

dialog.content: What's on your mind today?

dialog.content: How long have you been in this state?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Yes. I guess it has coincided with an increase in challenging behaviours from my children.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thank you. Yes, he has been helpful today. He took the children to school for me so that I was able to get some things done around the house.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: That's great, you have an awesome partner. I'd recommend spending time outdoor. Getting coop up for too long indoor is damaging to your mental state

dialog.speaker: seeker

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Have you considered hiring caretaker?

dialog.content: Thank you. Yes, I haven't been out to check on the veggie garden today. That usually gives me an opportunity to calm my mind. Unfortunately, I am not in a position to do so. There is nobody that my son would be comfortable with. But we are trying to implement some respite soon.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: whenever possible, you can take your children out with you on a trip to the park or the mountain. Nature is also good for kids with special need.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Most certainly. We try often to explore our natural environment. It can be limiting due to our daughter's physical disability but we manage the best we can to include her.

dialog.speaker: supporter

In the mean time, I will definitely put some of these things you've recommended in to practice. ☺️ You are right. I do need to take care of me. I need to stop feeling guilty for needing to do that.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Exercising might be helpful too. I like doing yoga or pilates, it really eases my mind when I have too much going on

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thank you. Yes, I need to get back in to the Ring Fit adventure on the Switch. It definitely helps my my and body feel stronger.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I believe you will overcome this!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thank you!

dialog.content: I am sure that you have been trying to do everything that you can do to help the situation.  It sounds like you choosing counseling was a good start.  It shows how much you care.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yes but my husband doesnt want to fi things. hes happy with having 2 women ive had to buy a recorder and put it in his car. The things i heard were horrible. he found out though.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: It is rough for our children to see adult stuff like this.  They might not be able to understand.  I would suggest trying to set down and talk to them about it, when you are ready.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I dont want my youngest to know. He loves his father and i dont want to destroy that

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: How do you feel about your husband not wanting to fix things?  Is that something that you are considering?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: i feel horrible. Im actually trying to fix things while he texts her every day i dont know whats gonna happen

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: That is a very thoughtful thing for you to put your son first.  He is lucky to have such a great mother, that obviously loves him.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: i do very much

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Have you tried to talk to your husband about your feelings and how you might not be willing to accept this?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: i do but every time i do he thinks that its that i dont trust him and that i hate him and i dont hate him or his lover. I just want things to go back they used to be. what should i do?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Have you thought about if you can trust him after that?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: im not sure if i can, but i dont want to live in constant paranoia of him im just so lost

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I can understand where you are coming from.  I have been in that situation myself and it is not an easy place to be.  For me, it took some time to accept that I deserved better than someone who didn't just want me.  Is that how you feel?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: kind of

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Understandably so.  I believe that this is just temporary and you will be amazed at how strong you are.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: you think so?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: If you are leaning toward not accepting not being enough for him, then I would suggest an exit plan.  Call a family member, or friend, to see if you can stay there awhile.  Have a cooling off period from your husband and reassess the situation

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: ok. ill consider that thank you so much this has been going on for half a year

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I absolutely do.  We normally find out that we are actually much stronger than we give ourselves credit for.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: thank you

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: That is wonderful news!  See you are starting to make a plan for a better life for you and your children.  You so got this!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: thank you so much. stay safe bye bye

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: youre welcome.  I am here if you need me

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: i have a feeling that everything will be okay.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: That is great!  Did you have a chance to think of anything else that might help you through this?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yes. Thanks to you i can broaden my search thank you. good bye

situation: Me and my girlfriend got into a fight over holiday break that I thought could be fixed but instead ended up in us breaking up

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I face the situation of me being sad because I thought we could let this fight go over time but instead it has lead to us breaking up

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Can you tell me more about the fight?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Yes, so we had a fight previously over Thanksgiving Break about how I woke her up from her sleep and she kicked me out of her place at like 4 in the morning. Then I pick her up to go try and get breakfast...then she starts punching me while I drive so I pull over. Then she keeps hitting me until I tell her to stop.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Breakups are usually sad for at least one of the couple.  Is your sadness because of missing her or being alone or something else ?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: It is because I do really miss her. I really hate that our fight got to that level to where we broke up

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Breakups are hard, but it sounds like she was violent

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Yeah she was a little violent. I was honestly a little scared for my life for a second but people make mistakes.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Have you talked since then?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: We have talked a little bit before hand this month. It was okay but I am still sad about what happened She was very open to talking and such but I just wasn't ready because my family found out about what happened and are worried about my safety

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: If safety is an issue, then I think that maybe moving on is a good decision

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I know but I am so sad because the break up was so quick and we did not really have closure after the whole fight happened between us. I still keep on thinking about her.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I suggest that you do things that will help you get over her., like going out with friends or a new hobby. Don't be in a hurry to get into a new relationship , but if one happens that would be great too.  Is this your first breakup?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I will definitely try to get over her using those techniques you just said. It's way harder to do than say though. No, this is not my first breakup with a woman but I felt like she was the one for me

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Breakups are not always the end, but they usually happen for a reason, and whenever violence is involved it is usually better to move on

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Maybe you're right! Just need to get productive and get my mind off of her for good since she was violent

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I suggest you start trying to have fun with others and getting yourself out there where there will be new opportunities

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I will definitely try. I know it will be hard because I am upset still but sometimes I guess moving on is the only thing that you can do in this situation

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: The sadness will eventually pass and I am sure there is someone out there that will be a good match for you

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Awww I hope so. Just like some people say...there are plenty of fish in the sea. Thank you for the advice. It was really helpful.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I wish you the very best .

situation: Hello. My baby of 11 years had passed away last week. This would be my pomeranian and I am devastated. I am fearful now of getting another puppy during Corona.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Hi!

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Good Afternoon.  How are you doing today?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I am having a sad day today. My mothers new husband passed 3 weeks ago because of Corona, Now, yesterday my best friend passed of old age. This is the worst time for all of this. I am reeling with grief!

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: That sounds terrible.  I can understand why you're sad today.  That's a lot to take in around the holidays.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
I am afraid to get another puppy. Yes you are right it is TOO much! I do not know how to deal. It seems everyone I talk to is going through a horrendous time with this virus and all the horrible predicaments it is putting people in. I am trying not to be selfish with my feelings knowing everyone else is having a bad time too...but DAMN! It almost is too much to take....
 Should I get another puppy riht away?
 I feel very lonely without him.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Getting a new puppy might be a way to make you feel happy during this dark time in your life.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I work at home now and I have a husband who does the same. Also my two kids got o school online. They are sad as well, but everyone knows he was my bestie,

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: It might be just what you need to have something to wake up and look forward to each day.  Especially during times like now when everyone is spending so much time alone inside.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
It is a spot not filled by humans.

 Yes. I suppose. Maybe even two would be better.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I completely agree.  Having a dog as a companion has been a life saver to me in so many situations.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
I would want him to have a friend this time.
 What kind of dog do you have?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content:
Having a playmate for the dog will make it easier to justify leaving when you do need to go back to work in the office.  The puppy won't be lonely.
 I have a yellow lab!  He's great!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
I hope to get a dog who enjoys working out with me like he did. 
 Oh and I am not going back into an office!
 Not for awhile...probably not forever.
 I do have the option of staying home and working indefinetly so I am grateful for that.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I'd suggest a dog with a lot of energy if you like to workout!  What kind of dog did you have previously?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I like being here watching over my kids and pets. I think I will stay working at home.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Just from talking to you, it sounds like working from home is a great fit for you!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
Pomeranian....he really didn't work out with me:), just running, jumping , and keeping up with my energy....doing what doggies do. 
 His energy was happiness to me.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Pomeranians are such cute dogs!  They always look like they're smiling!  And they're small enough that having two won't be crowded!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I appreciate your feedback. I think that having two pomeranians this time is a good idea....and you are right they are always smiling! You have boosted my mood and made me feel hopeful. I thank you!

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I'm glad that I could help you!  I hope your new puppies bring you much happiness!  I think they will boost your spirits a lot!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I am also going to stay at home while working for peace of mind. I hope you have a great new year. Stay safe! Goodbye!

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Have a great new year!  Bye!!

thats the last hope i am having

situation: My mom got in a serious accident and ever since, I have developed anxiety whenever I cannot be around my parents
