Keep pushing on and know that if one opportunity doesn't work out a positive attitude will make all the difference. Just because you haven't found one yet doesn't mean you won't.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thanks for making confidence. I feel relaxed. I believe this will surely be a chance to find myself and get a better opportunity to be relieved from my previous difficulties. Only GOD should have forced me this way, I believe.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Your faith is healthy and gives you purpose. Similarly you have to believe that the dots will connect in your favor. Maybe you can't connect them looking forward, but looking backwards you have to trust that the dots will somehow connect in your future.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
I felt anger over my previous employer since he was not giving any time for me to switch over, at least 2 months.
 Even then he was satisfied till then.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: It can be frustrating to focus on your last job, especially if you haven't found a new one yet. Perhaps once you find a new job your disappointment with the last one won't be so disappointing anymore. If the new job is better you wouldn't have found it working the last job.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
Anyhow my loyalty was not encouraged to perform more. I have to move from some back again.
 Any I am preparing myself better, using the break time to gain my knowledge further and sharpen my skills, reading and viewing many articles in the net and youtube. I helps me a lot.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: It's great that you're staying productive and improving yourself. If your desire to improve yourself is as strong as your desire to find a new job I'm confident you will.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: It helps me to forget the past and concentrate on the future.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Don't let your past define you, let your present choices pave a new path into the future.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I am going forward only. I think I am very close to the treasure, not knowing how many hits to dig. I require your greetings for a better prospectus. .

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I'm confident you will. What do you mean?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thanks for your motivation. . . .  BYE BYE

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Thanks for sharing with me. Take care now.

situation: police shootings of unarmed black people

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Hi I am seeking support to assist me with better sleep patterns.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Hi there, let me get a deeper understanding of your existing sleep pattern. Do you suffer from insomnia or another type of sleep disorder?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: No, it is not insomnia.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Okay, are you drinking enough water and eating a healthy diet?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I could improve my water intake and eat more vegatables.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I like to analyze my own habits every now and then, it helps me stay in check. You can definitely benefit from meditating and self reflecting.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thanks!  What other ideas do you have?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Of course! I always knock right out after a workout. But if you aren't able to, just simple things like turning all the lights off at the same time every night and laying in bed will help. It will align your circadian rhythm!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Great, but I wake up frequently thinking about the recent events surrounding police and how they treat black people.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: It definitely is a valid reason to be kept awake. The only good part about something so horrible, is that you have the power to make sure you will continue to be a good person. If everyone was as empathetic as you, the world would be a better place. Thank you for caring so deeply about such a brutal matter.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I wish there were more caring people in the world.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Kindness is contagious, and you definitely have a kind heart. As long as you remain soft in a hard world, people will recognize that and follow suit. The world is becoming more aware, and we have the power to raise future generations with more knowledge and love for one another. Caring doesn't come naturally to many unfortunately, but the ways of inspiring the people that don't care, are endless. We as a society can definitely think of more ways to care for one another.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Correct, but having a kind heart does not keep me from waking up & worrying about my son and other black men in my family.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I worry about my sons and husband and father all the time... I shift my focus on loving them and cherishing every moment we have together. Police or not, the time we have is not promised..

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: That's good advice. Are you still there?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: A hot cup of tea never hurt too! But in all seriousness, I can completely understand your sleep troubles. It is much deeper than just that. Perspective is the key to life. You are a strong and empathetic soul.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: okay Love conquers all

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: That is so beautifully true

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I'm looking forward to a fulls night rest.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: That is good, lavender baths or showers will also ease and relax the troubled mind.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Relaxing is good therapy.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I like to relax with a book and a blanket sometimes too.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Self care is needed.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Self care is definitely something we can overlook accidentally. Being self aware is a daily practice.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I agree.  Loving ourselves & the ones we care about too.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: It is good that we spoke today, I am going to hug my sons a little harder when I see them tonight.

situation: I LOVE MY FRIEND BUT TODAY FIGHT

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I love my friends but today hatred in my life

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: It's great that you have friends in your life that you love. What is causing you to feel that you hate your life today?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: My friend saw the lie

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Ok. Your friends saw the lie. do you mean to say that your friends uncovered a lie you told them?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Yes he told lie to me

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: So a good friend told you a lie? Do you feel that the lie was meant to hurt you?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I am very hurted

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: How did the lie hurt you?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: He say that lie i will hurt

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: How long have you know him? Has he lied to you in the past?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: 10 year friendship no one lie to the past

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: That says a lot that he has never lied to you prior to this. What do you think changed about him to cause him to lie this time?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: He say sorry to me i accepted

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Sometimes a little space can help resolve feelings. Do you feel that a little time would help you to be able to accept his apology and forgive him?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Ok i accepted

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Have you communicated to him that his lie hurt you?

situation: I have complete unsupportive friends its to the point where i dont even feel like i have friends any more .

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Hello how are you?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: hello im looking for someone to talk to  im fine how are you

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I'm doing ok I'm glad you are good. Is it snowing by you? Merry Christmas!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
thats great and no its not snowing its very cold thow
 merry christmas to you also

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: How can I help you today?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: im having some issues with friends not actually being friends

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I hear you are having trouble figuring out which friends are really your friends and which ones aren't. Is that about right?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yes

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I understand that... Did something happen that makes you feel like that?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yes their is no communication or interaction between me and them nobody answers phone calls txt messages etc

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Is this a significant other?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: no friends

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Are they ignoring you?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: when we where younger we all hung out all the time now that we are older its like they talk with each other im not sure if i did anything or not

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Are you sure they are okay? Or not away with family for the holidays?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: it doesnt matter they still keep open communication with each other

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: That's no good what do you think the problem is?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I believe its because I am the friend that has financial trouble and normally needs to borrow money

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Do you owe someone already?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: no anything i owe i always pay back  perhaps they are tired of being asked

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: That can get in the way of a friendship sometimes, but I try not to get ahead of myself and  jump the gun. They may have lost a phone or something may have come up... That very well could be... Are you working?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: no im not currently  I also think sometimes to myself that they don't answer because they think I'm asking for money

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I see, Have you tried for unemployment?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yes i dont qualify

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I understand that. What if that is the case? You may need to talk to them and let them know how you feel about that. How long has this been going on?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I'm nervous about asking them why  and it happens on and off like when they feel lie it i guess i will say maybe 4 months

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I understand that, but if you want to get to a point that you feel better about it then you will have to speak to them.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yes i know i hope everything be immediately resolved and not lead into other problems and end of friendshps

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Do you see them everyday? I understand that, are you able to go over there.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: no i dont live in the same city anymore when i go out of town i can visit but with covid19  rules

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Well I can see that you have put the effort in to try and keep the relationship so it sounds like the ball is in their court if they want to do the same.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yes

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Well that is about all that can be done and wait for them to come around...Do you have  any hobbies?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yes i like to read and play music

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I like to go on runs every morning. It helps to clear my mind and makes it easier to brush things off when they bother me. What instrument do you play?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: my sister goes on runs in the morning time and says it relax her for the day i think i migh i played the piano when i was in highschool

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: It is a really good stress reliever. I played when I  was younger, didn't ever get very good. Did you?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: no i didn't i had to stop because i have what the doctors call a trigger finger it caused great pain when i would practice

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Hmm, well maybe take some more lessons, We can always strive to be better at everything we do.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yes that is true

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Maybe take a run in order to clear your mind. I'm sure they will come around.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: i think i would start off walking i am not in shape to run yes i will give them time maybe stop reaching out so much

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: That may be a good idea. Good talk

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yes thank you for talking with me and giving great advice

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: to them and may find out that it was never anything against you

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yes maybe everyone is stressed at some level thanks to covid19

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I sometimes get ahead of myself and try to figure out what is going on and thinking that it was something I did. You are right too. COVID has stressed everyone out to the max. It has been a crazy year I am glad that it is almost over.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yes i hope next year bring blessings for everyone

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I'm sure it will. Is there anything else I can help you with today?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: no that was all thanks for speaking with me

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: No problem, I hope everything works out for you and your friends. Have a great New Year!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: you to and thanks

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Good day!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: good bye

situation: My friends are going out to the bar without me tonight.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Hello.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Hi, how are you? What would you like to talk about today?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I am sad since my friends are going out tonight without me.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: That's too bad. Did they not invite you? Where are they going?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: They are going to the bar. No they didn't invite me. I am not sure why.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I'm sorry to hear that. Did you have a falling-out?.  The pandemic has been hard on many people. I figure many friendships are going through a rough patch, eh.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Not that I can think of. We haven't talked much this week since school took up all of my time. Papers due and all that jazz.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: A busy time of the semester. How's school going for you?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Not bad. It is a touch harder than I thought but I am passing and that is all that matters. Thank you for asking.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: School's going well enough for you. You'd like to re-establish ties with your friends. Do you do other stuff with them besides going to bars?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: We'll grab a coffee in the middle of the day if our schedules line up. Happens once or twice a week.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: That sounds like a good opportunity to see which way the wind is blowing, so to speak. Maybe you can feel them out to get a sense of what might be wrong?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Yeah that's a good idea. Open up some line of communication to see what is happening.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Coffee is casual, but people open up when they're drinking. That'll loosen their tongues.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Loosen them if they don't burn them by accident first! lol

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Don't take it personally. It's just one trip to a bar. There might be something else going on that you don't know about. Don't jump to conclusion. If they keep snubbing you, then you need to worry a bit.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: True. I do tend to jump to conclusions. Probably was some kind of misunderstanding. I will reach out to them on Sunday when I wish them a happy Easter to see if we can set up something during the week next week.

dialog.speaker: supporter

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
I am having Easter with the family so I can't do that but good idea otherwise.
 Thank you for your help. You did a great job. You are good at this!

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I've had a bit of Easter wine this evening. Easter drinking starts on Friday. Puts the "good" in "Good Friday."

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Yes it is good Friday. Thank you again and Happy Easter!

I just want to tell my ex who cheated on me with her ex I still love her.

His hands are so big he could be a power forward in the WNBA
 and average "15 Minutes' per game

dialog.speaker: supporter

dialog.speaker: supporter

situation: I'm fearful of where I'll be living in the future.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
I've tried this before and there wasn't anyone on the support side...
 I also tried to be the supporter but I think the screen froze at some point. I couldn't complete that side. So, I'm trying this again. Not sure if I got credit for the others.  Hoping I won't be punished with a rejection for talking to myself.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Hello how are you?  I am here to support you.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Oh, hi! Thank you.  I was just talking to myself. lol No one showed up the last few times I tried to do this.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content:
How can I help support you today?
 I know these are tough times and we all need to be heard.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I'm just looking for someone new to talk to. I don't really feel like I can express my actual feelings in my current living arrangement.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I understand.  I have had to stay by myself for most of the year due to the pandemic.  That has been hard.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
I've heard the pandemic has affected a lot of people. I'm always alone anyway...or with my roommate,so I haven't noticed much of a difference. 
 It's difficult when we have absolutely nothing in common.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Have you tried different games that help you get to know each other?  Maybe try a movie or series.  I loved Sweet Magnolia's on Netflix.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
I'm mainly worried that she'll throw me out of the house and I'll have no where to live.  Oh god forbid we watch a movie. She's too obsessed with CNN to watch anything else.
 She's become brainwashed by the tabloid media...

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Oh my goodness.  The good thing is there is a moratorium on evictions so she would not be able to do that legally.  CNN can be overwhelming.  Try giving her some type of distraction.  Suggest yoga or some type of bonding. I think 24/7 news is problematic but here to stay.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I actually do yoga every evening. She hates it. I'm living in her home without a lease, so I wonder if she can just tell me to leave. I can't imagine why anyone would want to watch the news for more than to just catch up (If you like lies and nonsense)

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: As long as you have property there she would have to formally evict you.  That is the good news.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: That is good news. Thanks for letting me know that.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content:
I think it is best to stick with a short local news report.
 My pleasure.  So many people are worried about losing their place to stay but thankfully most are protected due to the pandemic.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I just found mturk. I just started here. Any advice as to what to do? I've mainly just been doing surveys. I'm not good at the small tasks.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Check Youtube videos on using Panda's.  It will help you make more money.  I have done over 750,000 hits.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
Oh wow, that's amazing! I've done this particular hit 3 times...I've only found a person once though. I will definitely check out the videos. thank you!
 What are pandas? Or is it too hard to explain?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: You are welcome.  Panda's help you keep grabbing hits.  You can store 25 at a time.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
Oh, I see. Great! Thanks so much for chatting with me and for the advice. 
 It's been nice to have someone new to vent to. :)

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Have a great night and take care of yourself.  It has been a pleasure.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thank you, you too!

situation: My job has seen more and more responsibilities and pressure because of the pandemic. I really want to quit!

dialog.content:
Hello! How can I help?
 What is wrong?

dialog.content: My job is driving me nuts! I can't handle it anymore.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: How is it driving you nuts?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: The pressure has been building and building. They keep giving me more responsibility, but no more help! The pandemic has really made my job a lot harder.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I have also went through the same thing as you and I know how hard it feels, so believe in yourself You have been given responsibility because you are competent enough to carry it out

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I want to quit the job and get away from the pressure. I'm worried about my mental health and also about the risk of COVID. I think that's the problem! I'm TOO competent.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Don't quit your job because it will only make life harder in the long run

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
I think the company wouldn't give me so much work if I were worse at my job. The reward for doing a good job is more work!
 I know, I know! But the anxiety is killing me! Every day at work is worse than the last!

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Being competent is good and you will surely get compensation for the amount of work you put in, maybe a promotion

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
I don't want to quit. How do I find a balance? How do I manage my anxiety?
 I don't think the company wants to give me a promotion because that would cost them more money. Maybe another company would pay me better.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content:
You could always work harder and show them you can work, maybe then they will offer you a promotion
 You can manage your anxiety by maybe meditating, it seems you have a lot going on so it would help to forget about things for a while

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I have never tried meditation. That's a good idea. Maybe some other people at the company would like to try it too.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Yeah! Get others to do it with you and you may start to feel more comfortable

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: That's true. Meditation is a good way to get in contact with my emotions. It might help me not feel so isolated.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Yeah! You are never alone you can always get through this

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Yeah. I *can* get through this, if I reach out to others at the company. Maybe not the managers, but the other employees certainly know what I'm going through.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Yes and maybe they are going through the same thing so they would like to find a solution as well

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I feel the anxiety getting better. I know that others have tried meditation to deal with stress and anxiety. It's a good suggestion. Thanks!

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Your Welcome anytime!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I'm actually looking forward to work tomorrow! I bet that my co-workers will welcome the suggestion of meditation.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Yes thats the spirit! Don't let your mood change now

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Will do! Have a good day.

not too good

s soo depressing

dialog.content: that will be all for now

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Okay. Have a good night!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: you too

situation: Worried about my daughter abd her academic struggles. She has a genetic condition and some learning differences. Struggling to cope to work and do day to day things and give her as much support as she needs.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Hello. How are you doing today?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Hi, I'm struggling today.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I'm sorry to hear that. Anything in particular that is bothering you?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I just feel worn out with everything I have to do.  I don't know what else I can d to help my daughter.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I understand that you are feeling worn out and don't know what else you can do to help your child. Is there something specific going on or is it just life in general?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: My daughter struggles with school work and memory. She learns differently and needs lots of support. I have contacted the school a number of times over the years but never really had any support or acknowledgement from them. I guess it's just an accumulation of things.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: You have tried hard to help her and that is admirable. Don't beat yourself up and be proud of the things you have done for her.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: But what do I now. She's 17 and it's so difficult to give her the time and then  encourage her to tell me when she needs help and for her to be willing to accept it.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: While I do not have kids, from what I have seen my friends and family do in this situation is try to find something that your daughter is interested in and attempt to build off of that. So instead of her learning to just learn, she is learning something that is relevant to her. Maybe that might spark something in her to come up with her way of learning since traditional methods aren't working.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: That is great advice. She does climb and hasn't been able to climb or see her friends with everything closed. I think as she will be able to again soon may be that will help her to relax and get back into it. She does learn through repetition but has lacked enthusiasm especially in the last few months.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content:
Having her go climbing more sounds like a good plan. Hopefully things are opening up around you now that the vaccine is becoming more common. 
 Repetition is tough. I know I used a lot of flash cards as a way of learning through high-school and college. It's an old method but it can work.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: She had heart  surgery as a baby so has actually had the vaccine herself as she's in the vulnerable category.  I think she ends up spending so long making aide memoires that she then leaves herself so little time to actually study.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I can imagine after having heart surgery as a baby she wants to live life to it's fullest extent and prioritizes making memories over school. Does she ever talk about what her plans are for after high-school? At some point she will have to connect the dots of having to get a job to be able to go out and have fun, and unfortunately doing OK in school comes with that. That or a vocational school to learn a trade (what I personally did).

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: What did you do? Her interests are music and photography. Recently she has started a gardening club with the horticulture department at school. She does enjoy her social life well when she has been able to have it. She has had social ups and downs but apart from the epidemic she has been happier than in her earlier years at school. You are right she is becoming an adult and will find her place. At 17 I guess she doesn't have to decide just yet.  You have certainly made me feel a bit more positive.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Sorry for the delay. I am glad you are feeling more positive. I was into cars so I went to vocational school to become an auto mechanic. After a couple years of that I realized I wasn't cut out for physical labor and went to college. But the knowledge from working on cars helped me understand things better at college since I had real world applications I could use it on. Gardening and Horticulture is a great hobby! That definitely could cross over into some of her science classes to make things more interesting and relevant to her.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thank you so much for your time and kindness today. You helped me refocus and some of the things you said were just what I needed to hear.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Glad I was able to help. Sometimes just having someone to bounce things off of makes a big difference. You have a good heart and good intentions. I wish you and your daughter the best.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thank you.  Take care :-)

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: You're welcome. It was my pleasure. Please hit the quit button and take the survey. I can not end the chat from my side. Thank you!

situation: I am extremely stressed with work and am very unhappy.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Hello

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Hi how are you?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Im not doing very well at all.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: What's going on?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
I am very stressed out with my work. 
 I feel like I am being over worked but I also feel stuck at this job.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I know the feeling. what do you do for work?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I am a lab assistant.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: how long have you been in your role? and do you have any coworkers that feel similar to you that you know about?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I have been in this role for about a year. I am the only one at this level. I take care of a lot of the productivity and logistical work. Im just really stressed recently

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Somewhat similarly I'm in a supply chain role, for a year now, and the only one at my level too. I often feel like I'm alone in my job and that I manage my boss... It's pretty frustrating. is there anything that makes your job less stressful?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I think that being able to have a better work life balance would help but I have a hard time talking to my boss.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: do you think your boss would be receptive if you did talk to them? or would they dismiss your concerns?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I am unsure. They are very much all about work. I am afraid they wont see my point and understand my want for a better work life balance.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: This has been a pretty hard year for everyone. however you ultimately gotta do whats best for you.  Have you considered searching for a new job?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I have but it is hard to find a job at this time. I also really like what I do but wish I could have more balance. Do you have any advice for how to balance stress at work and your life outside of work?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I'm in the same boat. I would say, the things that work best for me, are to take breaks during my work day and go for walks or as soon as I'm done with work I force myself to go for a walk. I find moving helps me feel better. I also use that time to think about how I can look for a new job or rethink the things that are bothering me maybe you can try something similar?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I think I could try that. I have a hard time detaching from work especially working from home. I feel like I never really 'leave' the office. I am always working even when I normally wouldnt be.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Change the scenery, it'll help! plus movement releases endorphins which make you feel better.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thank you! I will try that.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: no problem!

situation: I only have two weeks left to make major revisions to my scientific paper that was recently submitted to a journal. I am freaking out.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Hi! Hope you are doing well today?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Hi, I'm actually pretty stressed about an upcoming deadline.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: You have some work related deadlines and you are worried about that. Correct me if I am wrong.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: That's exactly right. It's a deadline for a journal that I recently submitted a paper to.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: That must be really hard, but I know you will finish it on time.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I know, I always get worked up about deadlines even though I rarely miss them. This one is a bit more important than usual, however. I am just so stressed!

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: It seems it must be very challenging for you.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Exactly! This is a big step for me in the PhD program I'm in, so it's definitely a bit more pressure than previous deadlines.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: In such situation, I make the strategy by distributing the time and work load equally. That's how I stay energetic and motivated..

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: That's a good idea. Do you mean just do a little bit each day?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Take a rough estimate like how much can be done in a day. It will reduce your work load

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Well I have 30 more revisions to address and 15 more days to complete it. So, maybe I can make a goal of 2-3 revisions each day?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Apparently when we start working on such project, things start coming at right place itself.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thank you, you have helped me make a trajectory for how to accomplish this. Although, I am still very anxious about the difficulty.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Don't think too much about the remaining, just focus on what you are doing presently.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Good idea, the present moment is better to focus on. Any recommendations on relaxation techniques?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Try to take shot break or do deep breathing in middle. It will help you in staying energetic and focused.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Yeah, like little incentives throughout. I think I will definitely incorporate deep breathing. Let me try now and I'll let you know how I feel.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Sure! :)

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Wow, I just did the breathing technique and I do feel more relaxed. Thanks for the advice!

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: That's Great! Best wishes for you.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thank you, best to you as well.

situation: i and this lady went on a date last week, we were both in love and so i asked her out on our first date.... she told me yes the next day slept over at her place and we had sex... after a week she started behaving strange.. by the time i called her so we could talk she said she doesn't love me anymore

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: hi

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Hi! How are you today?

dialog.speaker: seeker

dialog.content: I'm doing well. How can I help you today?

dialog.speaker: supporter

yes i am ahere
 i and this lady dated for 2weeks 
 suddenly she said she doesn't love me anymore imagine that

its very hard

yes i have faith in people very fast
 seriously its like your seeing my mind

i heard is better to let a girl love you thank for you loving her 
 yes 
 my ACHEIVEMENT IN LIFE AND WORK

situation: I am looking for more online jobs. but it is hard to find.

dialog.content: Hello, how are you feeling at the moment?

dialog.content: hi! I am good. you?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I am not so bad thanks. Is there anything on your mind right now?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Yes I have been wanting to find online jobs like this but it is so competitive

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I hear you! I do gig work online too but it can be very difficult to find any. I think a lot more people are working online due to the pandemic.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
totally
1

dialog.content:
anytime, true true
 i have applied to Appen a few times, and they always say there is no position available now

dialog.content: Are you aware that there are organisations that can offer a little help at this time? Food banks for instance, though I know some people feel awkward about accepting such help.

dialog.speaker: supporter

dialog.speaker: supporter

sorry about that, but that's good, people help each other

dialog.content:
yes
 how about you

situation: effects of the pandemic

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Hello I was wondering if I can discuss the effects of the pandemic have on my mental health.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content:
Hello
 How has the pandemic affected your mental health?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Well, right now my city is undergoing a second wave and it was doing very well so far, but in the past two weeks, have been a slow and steady surge of daily cases. Just feeling stress and fear from the second wave.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I understand how hard living through this pandemic is. It is such crazy time! I also have felt fear and stress from the second wave of the pandemic.  It is natural to feel stressed when there is a global pandemic.  I am sure with the correct coping strategies you can handle this pandemic!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
yeah it's crazy. I am starting to feel paranoid and stressed everytime I go out for groceries. I work once or twice a week outside of the home and I generally get groceries once every two weeks, but my guard is up again, ever since the first wave was gone by the end of summer. 

 I am also sorry to hear that you have stress from this. I sympathize fully.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I have been doing grocery pick-up because of the pandemic, so I sympathize with you.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thank you for the positive message and believing in me.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Wearing a mask and using hand sanitizer can keep you safe and healthy while grocery shopping.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
grocery pick-up, that's not a bad coping mechanism. I don't know, I don't want to spend the extra money for the special handling though, plus I just feel paranoid having someone touch my groceries. But that's just me. 

 sanitizer I should probably get, just a disposable one to keep on me at all times.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Practicing mindfulness and going on a short walk in nature can help with your stress.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yes that would help I suppose, just that I stopped going out, to the gym, movies, anything frivolous ever since the pandemic started.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: At some grocery stores, they have made pick-up free due to the pandemic. You should look into that if you are interested in it.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: My life was put on a pause and I still can't believe it's november already.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I also have stopped going out since the pandemic started.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: ok, I will look into the grocery method.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Just from chatting with you, you seem to be very open to suggestions and are devoted to making it through these crazy times.  Has your work life been affected by the pandemic?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
so literally, I only go out for a purpose, meaning special errands like groceries and personal administrative tasks, banking, work, and only that. 

 work life, let me think
 I only started a new work in September, and it's not much (about two days a week), so I can't comment too much about that. It is stressful seeing more people than usual outside of my home and in such close quarters

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Yes, I also only go out for groceries and work. I only work with a few people, so that helps.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: so I get nervous in general when I am at work but I do my work just the same. May not be able to work as well because I have to breathe through a mask, and some other small difficulties.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: That is good that you can continue to do your work the same.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thank you for all the positive messages so far and in understanding and sympathizing with me.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Is there anything else I should know about how the pandemic is affecting you?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: pretty much. If anything, it's my academic life at home that has changed not so well.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Are you a student?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
yes, I take online courses and I tend to procrastinate a lot more and get distracted as I find myself more and more at home. Just getting carried away and now have impending deadlines. 
 I can get through it but it has had a toll on my productivity. 
 I was just taking my sweet time with it and that wasn't good

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content:
I am also a student and am not motivated to do school work at home, so I completely understand. I am sure you are successful at school!  Having a planner may keep you organized and on-task.  Dedicating a certain time frame and area for school work might help, as well. 
 Dedicating a certain time frame and area for school work might help, as well.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Because prior to the pandemic, I was pretty regimented with set schedules and can clear my mind with work-outs and going to the gym and movies, but now it's not that simple.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Is there anything else I can help you with?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thank you and I hope your schooling goes well also.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Thank you, you too!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
yeah I like your idea of dedicating the time. I find that I am slacking off and being disorganized in areas like time management. So yes I have to improve on that. 

 I suppose you have been doing your schooling relatively better in your situation? 
 I hope you do anyhow

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content:
Great ideas! 
Is there anything else I can help you with?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
would you have any other advice on how to overcome things like time management with academics? like how to avoid procrastination?
 Because this was so much better in the past that I just had set schedules and can clear my mind by going out, etc. 
 and feeling refreshed and feeling the urgency to study again. 
 But that's gone for me now.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I would reccomend setting deadlines in your planner of when tasks need to be completed and also setting timers for 20 minutes at a time where you have to focus for that long before you can do any other task.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
Great, I think that's a good area for me to go into. 
 Timers and set agendas

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Yes!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
like a timetable when they used to hand out when I used to be in high school, let's say
 and this hour I do this, etc. 
 and as you say, yoga or work out in between
 all great ideas I think

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Yes, excellent!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
thank you for that. 
 ok then. I think I am set now to get back to my studies then with a refreshed mind.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: You are so welcome. Have a great day!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
Thank you for all your help. You as well and I hope your studies and work go well. 
 have a great day also

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Thank you! Talk to you later.

situation: I am depressed about Covid and being restricted from going places.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Hi! Is there anything you'd like to talk to me about today?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Hi, yes. I am having a really hard time and feeling depressed.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I am sorry to hear that. Would you like to tell me what the problem is?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I feel like I am very isolated. I can not leave my house because I am at high risk of getting Covid. So I feel so alone and kind of helpless since all this has started.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I can understand how that feels - I have not been able to go out for weeks either. Are you able to have visitors?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I am not allowed to be around anyone. I know its for my own health but that doesn't help when I am so lonely. It seems like I can not contribute to anyone or lend a hand to people. I am just stuck at home with a feeling of doom.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: That is very rough. Have you considered joining internet communities so you can at least talk with people who are in the same situation?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I do not really know how to do that but it seems like a really good idea that I have never thought of before. Do you think it would help my mood?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I think it really could, yes. Isolation is a very difficult thing to deal with. Just knowing someone else understood could really help.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I like that idea. I hate feeling like I am a debbie downer type. I do not want to tell anyone how I feel. I am trapped in a few ways.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: There is absolutely no problem with feeling bad and confiding in people. Many people are feeling the same right now.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Sometimes I feel like i am the only one. I have a good life and have my health so I feel guilty for complaining about being sad. I have not been able to eat or clean my house. I just lay around with no energy.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: So you feel as though life is just passing you by and you are not accomplishing anything during the lockdown?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Yes, exactly. That is precisely how I feel! It seems like I am in a movie with a sad ending and it just keeps repeating over and over.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Try to focus on the fact that it will be a new year soon - it surely can't (fingers crossed!) be worse than this one

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I like your ideas and want to start using them right away. I want to reach out online and find a group to join.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Facebook is a great online site and there are lots of groups there for all interests

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: That is a really valid point and helping me see the bigger picture in life. I need to know it will not always be this way.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Please trust me that it will not. Time goes really slowly during a crisis, it seems

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thank you for your time and help today. I have not felt this good in a long time. I feel very understood and validated.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: It feels great to be able to help people. I really wish you all the best in the coming weeks and months. Enjoy the rest of you day!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thank you very much! I will go on to Facebook now.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I hope you can find some like minded people there  (you need to quit from your end as I can't :))

situation: I have a great friend that has died of corona virus. I am shattered because I could not see her in her last moments or go to her funeral. All we had was facetime. She was only 35 with severe asthma. I am reeling. This happened two weeks ago and my sadness and depression is overwhelming. How can I get over this?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Hello, what can I help you today?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
My depressive feelings and how to deal with them in a way I can cope.
 hello by the way....:)

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: How long have you lived with depression?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: For two weeks now.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Do you have problem with sleeping, eating or daily activity because of it?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
I have never experienced depression until now.
 Yes. I work remotely and my concentration is way off. It is affecting my production at work. I'm not enthused about anything. I am eating less. My husband tries to comfort me and it feels good in the moment but goes away when I am alone.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: It seems like you're confused as what to expect and react as I understand Depression is tough to deal with. We can try to find a way to temporarily suppress it but ultimately, we need to find the cause and treat

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
I am not confused. I just need suggestions on overcoming a death like this. All my happiness is wrapped up in this corona virus.9 Friends, family, coworkers, outings.)
 How do you deal with death?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I cry, crying actually helps since it relieves the pain youhave to go through. After you cry, your body tends to be exhausted and you can just sleep without thinking However, the best way to cope with death and depression in general is stay outdoor, be closed tothe nature

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
This is true and I have noticed that crying over this is something I have not done much. I do workout intensely 4 times a week but that has fallen off too. I do workout inside with a home gym. Maybe running outside wouls be more beneficial and help me feel closer spiritually towards her.
 I thi
nk I'm still shocked a little.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I have noticed that whenever I'm depressed, I feel better staying outdoor so try doing that more often. I understand. I also experience sudden lost a few years ago, I still haven't overcome completely but I now can be at ease thinking of him

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I like these suggestions and I will try this! Thanks for great advice!

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: every emotion that you experience will be messy and confusing, but it's totally normal. Dealing with death is never easy.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Your so right but I already feel better after chatting with you. Thanks again!
